text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yay! Yes! Yes! I came in first, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Me! Shining brilliantly center stage in the winning
concert!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You were watching close, right? What did you
think?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You were watching close, right? What did you
think?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But... I hope you don't think that's enough to
satisfy me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer! Keep it coming! I wanna hear
all about how cute I am!
choice_data_list:
Well, well, well... Someone's getting a little full
of themselves!

Well, well, well... Someone's getting a little full
of themselves!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, took you long enough to notice! I'm in a
fantastic mood! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta put on a big smile and enjoy this
fabulous victory to the fullest...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Because today's gonna be an important milestone
on my journey to becoming a top Umadol! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: We can't get too comfortable... I agree!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm trying to become a top Umadol who
doesn't lose to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I have to keep on winning forever and ever so
that I never let go of center stage!
choice_data_list: If anyone can do it, I know it's you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer! That makes me so happy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for believing in me. Now I have to
work even harder. For you...
